generatedArtifacts.tailoredResumeSummary: Uploaded resume jay_kumar_gupta_nit_kkr.pdf was used as the primary context. Focused JavaScript, React, Next.js, Node.js to match the Jobs At Aftershoot role at Careers.
generatedArtifacts.coverLetterExcerpt: I am excited to apply for the Jobs At Aftershoot role at Careers. My background in JavaScript, React, Next.js and my focus on becoming a strong Jobs At Aftershoot make this opportunity especially compelling to me. I would be glad to contribute to Careers's team with a practical, detail-oriented approach to building reliable backend systems and supporting product delivery in onsite engineering environments. With my academic foundation and hands-on project work, I am confident I can add value while continuing to grow in a role aligned with Remote opportunities.

shortAnswers.question: Why are you interested in this role?
shortAnswers.answer: This role aligns with my goal of becoming a strong Jobs At Aftershoot and uses skills I have already practiced through projects and coursework.

shortAnswers.question: What makes you a match?
shortAnswers.answer: My background in JavaScript, React, Next.js, Node.js closely matches the technical expectations in the job description.
